bird.name: 墨西哥妍蜂鸟
bird.summary: 墨西哥妍蜂鸟（学名：Eupherusa ridgwayi），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 墨西哥妍蜂鸟体重约3.8克，翼长约55.8毫米，嘴峰长约20.8毫米，喙宽度约2.8毫米，喙厚度约2.3毫米，跗蹠长约4.8毫米，尾长约35.8毫米。墨西哥妍蜂鸟在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在…

relations.subject: 墨西哥妍蜂鸟
relations.evidence: They are the northernmost species of their genus. Although there is little known of the specific habitat requirements for Mexican woodnymphs, we are aware that they reside in humid forests, canyons and foothills at elevations of . They can be found at the forest and open woodland, and may inhabit some coffee plantations
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: 墨西哥妍蜂鸟
relations.evidence: Mexican woodnymphs are vulnerable, threatened by habitat loss through deforestation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 墨西哥妍蜂鸟
relations.evidence: Mexican woodnymphs are vulnerable, threatened by habitat loss through deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
